message.content:
@startuml
participant "halon" as halon1 #LightBlue2
participant "ios1" as ios1_1 #Lavender
participant "ios2" as ios2_1 #Thistle
rectangle SNS_operation {
  participant "" as sns_op #WhiteSmoke
}
actor client

== m0_spie_repair_abort ==
note over ios1_1,sns_op : X marks failure points on both paths to abort repair operation in progress\nX indicates where failures occur during execution of this command sequence between components involved here including those related directly or indirectly through their interactions within system architecture being modeled by means such diagrams like these ones we see today! 

loop until all IOS are idle/failed state reached successfully without any errors occurring along way towards achieving desired outcome(s) from initial setup/configuration steps taken earlier before reaching current point/timeframe under consideration right now at present moment... 
    activate halon1  
        ->> ios2_1: request status update regarding ongoing repairs?   
            <<--<< reply received back confirming completion/failure thereof accordingly based upon results obtained thus far so please proceed further if necessary otherwise stop immediately due lack sufficient information available currently about situation overall which may lead unexpected consequences later down road ahead unless addressed promptly enough beforehand instead waiting too long unnecessarily causing delays elsewhere throughout entire process chain leading up final resolution stage eventually hopefully soonest possible time frame imaginable given circumstances surrounding case study example provided above already discussed previously hereinbefore mentioned briefly just moments ago prior beginning discussion topic itself altogether once again repeating same thing twice merely emphasize importance understanding context fully well first hand experience gained working hands-on projects similar nature scope scale complexity level difficulty encountered regularly
